purpose: Bounded Stage A 250K probe to test whether Neoma begins learning useful English and code structure after the Work Packet 15 pipeline smoke pass.

source_sample.permission_note: The source remains tokenizer-only. This separately copied 250K subset requires its own hash-bound model-training review.

token_budget.counting_rule: Exact provisional-8K tokenizer IDs plus one EOS token per record.

diversity.reason: The probe must cover English, code, documentation, tests, and stable self-knowledge while preventing related documents from crossing train/validation.

training_probe.architecture: 4 layers, d_model 192, 4 query heads, 2 KV heads, d_ff 576
training_probe.objective: normal next-token loss; no answer-only mask
training_probe.expansion_gate: No 500K/1M expansion unless this probe passes loss, integrity, efficiency, and generation-mechanics checks.

comparison.legacy_note: Work Packet 15 did not record native peak RSS. That baseline field may be unavailable and must be reported as null rather than invented.

hard_gates: zero frozen Stage B instruction records
provisional tokenizer hash and vocabulary match
fixed-batch training and validation loss recorded from step 0
later fixed-batch training loss below step 0
resume continues the same config and optimizer state
all required protocol/special tokens remain atomic
speed, peak RAM, and checkpoint size are recorded
prohibitions: Do not use frozen Stage B instruction records as Stage A model data.
Do not expand to 500K or 1M model training in this packet.
Do not call the 8K tokenizer final.
Do not interpret free-generation samples as proof of capability.
Do not silently substitute a different tokenizer, source sample, or evaluation set.
